description: Process hardware alarm codes embedded in device position transmissions, generate individual alert events per alarm type (SOS, tamper, vibration, accident, jamming, etc.), and route notifications to...

actors.name: GPS Device
actors.description: Embeds alarm codes in position transmissions when triggered by sensors or driver input

actors.name: Alarm Event Handler
actors.description: Parses alarm codes from positions and generates one alert event per active alarm

actors.name: Fleet User
actors.description: Receives alarm notifications and responds to emergencies

fields.name: alarm
fields.label: Comma-separated list of active alarm codes in the position (e.g. sos, tampering, vibration)

fields.name: alarm_type
fields.label: Individual alarm type. Supported values: sos, tampering, removing, vibration, movement, low_batte...

fields.name: suppress_duplicates
fields.label: When true, only new alarm codes (not in the previous position) generate events; prevents repeated...

rules.rule_1: A position may carry multiple simultaneous alarm codes; each alarm code generates a separate alert event
rules.rule_2: If suppress_duplicates is enabled, an alarm code that was already present in the previous position does not generate a new event; only newly appearing codes trigger alerts
rules.rule_3: Each alarm event is linked to the position where it was detected, preserving exact coordinates and time
rules.rule_4: Alarm events can be routed to users via any configured notification channel (push, email, SMS, webhook)
rules.rule_5: Alarm codes are device and protocol specific; the platform normalises known codes to standard identifiers

given: position carries one or more alarm codes in the alarm attribute

any: the alarm code was not present in the previous position

then.description: Alarm event recorded with type = alarm, alarm_type, device_id, position_id

alarm_event_generated.result: Alarm event stored; notification handlers dispatch alerts to subscribed users

given: alarm code is present in both the current and previous position
duplicate_alarm_suppressed.result: Duplicate alarm suppressed; no redundant alert generated

given: position does not carry any alarm attribute
no_alarm_code.result: No alarm event generated for this position

errors.message: The device referenced in the position record does not exist

events.name: alarm.triggered
events.description: A device has transmitted an alarm code requiring operator attention

related.reason: Alarm codes arrive as position attributes during ingestion
SOS and offline alarms may indicate the same emergency condition
Only users with access to the device receive alarm notifications

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Failed operations divided by total attempts

tradeoffs.reason: notifications must reach recipients even if delayed
